sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1250" key="a)dh/mwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀδήμων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <sense id="n1250.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sore-troubled</tr_>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> sub <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀδημονέω</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
